user.title: Add an AI account
user.description: Pick which account to track. Add the integration again for more.

menu_options.antigravity: Google AI - Code Assist: Gemini, Claude & GPT (OAuth)

antigravity.title: Connect Antigravity (Google AI Pro)
antigravity.description:
Mirrors Antigravity's Settings → Models view: the Gemini and Claude & GPT quota groups plus your AI Credits.

**Step 1.** Open this URL and sign in with the same Google account you use in Antigravity:

{auth_url}

**Step 2.** Click Allow. Your browser will then try to open an address starting with `http://localhost:8765/...` and show an error like "This site can't be reached". **That is expected — do not close it.**

**Step 3.** Copy the **entire address** from your browser's address bar (it contains `?code=...`) and paste it into the field below. You can paste the whole URL — the code is pulled out automatically.

Unofficial: uses Antigravity's own OAuth client and a private Google API.

data.authorization_code: Paste the localhost URL from your browser

data_description.authorization_code: This is NOT typed by hand. After approving, copy the full 'http://localhost:8765/oauth-callback?code=...' address from your browser's address bar (even though the page failed to load) and paste it here.

claude_web.title: Add a Claude subscription
claude_web.description:
Reads Claude subscription usage from claude.ai using your browser session — via the same passive usage endpoint the Claude desktop app polls (no messages sent).

Sign in at claude.ai, open DevTools → Network, click any request to claude.ai, and copy the entire `Cookie` request header (must include `sessionKey` and `cf_clearance`). The User-Agent should match that browser.

Unofficial — re-paste the cookie when it expires.

google_codeassist.title: Connect Gemini Code Assist
google_codeassist.description:
Reads your Gemini Code Assist quota (the same backend Antigravity / gemini-cli use). This gives real per-model usage — passively, no prompts sent.

1. Open this URL and sign in with your Google account:

{auth_url}

2. Approve access. The page then shows an authorization code.
3. Paste that code below with a name for this account.

Unofficial: uses gemini-cli's OAuth client and a private Google API; may break if Google changes it.

reauth_confirm.title: Update cookie
reauth_confirm.description: The session cookie for {account} expired or was rejected. Paste a fresh `Cookie` header.

error.invalid_auth: The credentials were rejected (expired session or Cloudflare block). Grab fresh ones.
error.oauth_failed: Could not exchange the authorization code. Get a fresh code and try again.

abort.already_configured: An account with this name already exists.

init.title: AI Limits options
init.description: Edit this account's details and options. Leave the cookie blank to keep the current one. The Claude active probe is only a fallback for accounts where the passive /usage endpoint returns nothing; Google Code Assist is always passive.

data.enable_probe: Enable active probe fallback (Claude; sends a message only if /usage is empty)
data.delete_after: Delete the probe conversation after each poll
